faqs.question: Why are cockroaches common in Carroll Gardens brownstones?
faqs.answer: Carroll Gardens' historic brownstones often have older plumbing, shared walls, and basement access points that cockroaches exploit. The neighborhood's mature trees and gardens, while beautiful, can also provide moisture and shelter that attract pests. Our treatments address both the interior infestation and exterior entry points specific to these classic buildings.

faqs.question: How much does cockroach extermination cost in Carroll Gardens?
faqs.answer: Our cockroach extermination services in Carroll Gardens range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and building type. Brownstones and multi-unit buildings may require more comprehensive treatment than single apartments. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Carroll Gardens residents. faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are highly effective against cockroaches while being safe for children and pets when applied correctly.
